LightningComponentBundle.description: SLDS toggle with optional tri-state (null). Can lock to binary after first pick or allow full three-state cycling.

property.name: enableTriState
property.label: Enable tri-state
property.description: Default is unset (center). User picks true or false once, then the control is a normal toggle.

property.name: enableFullTriState
property.label: Enable full tri-state
property.description: Requires Enable tri-state. Users can return to unset (center) after choosing true or false.

property.name: initialState
property.label: Initial state
property.description: Only used when tri-state is enabled. Unset = center (null). True or False start committed.
